,oa lans; gksxk A Vksy Iyktk dk voLFkku ¼fMtkbu pSust½ yackbZ ¼fd-eh-½ esa ftlds fy, 'kqYd lans; gS [k.M dk fMtkbu pSust* bankSj ftys esa lksuok; xk¡o ds fudV 4-000 fd-eh-a ij ¼fo|eku 16-600 fd-eh-½ 27-062 0-000 fd-eh- ls 27-062 fd-eh- rd /kkj ftys esa [kky?kkV xk¡o ds fudV 75-700 fd-eh- ij ¼fo|eku 82-800 fd-eh-½ 50-258 27-062 fd-eh- ls 77-320 fd-eh- rd dqy 77-320 *fo|eku pSust ds vuqlkj ifj;kstuk dk [k.M 12-600 fd-eh- ls 84-700 fd-eh- rd gSA^^ [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@480@09&10@lhvks@thlh&bankSj ¼bankSj&[kky?kkV½@chvksVh] nf{krk nkl] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th November, 2016 S.O. 3451(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 & 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the Use of Section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary Bridge on National Highway) Rules, 1997, the Central Government, vide notification S.O. 2070(E) dated 07.08.2009 and amendment notifications S.O. 2180(E) dated 22.06.2016 & S.O. No. 3098 (E) dated 30.09.2016, authorized M/s Oriental Pathways (Indore) Private Ltd. to collect and retain the fee for the development, operation and maintenance of the existing two lane road into four lane road from Km 12.600 to Km. 84.700 (Indore - Khalghat section) of the National Highway No. 3 in the State of Madhya Pradesh; Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 & 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the use of section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary Bridge on National Highway) Rules, 1997, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification published vide S.O. 2070(E) dated 07.08.2009 & amendment fee notification S.O. No. 3098 (E) dated 30.09.2016 and in supersession of the amendment notification published vide S.O. 2180(E) dated 22.06.2016 except as respect things done or omitted to be done before such supersession:- Para 2 of the Notes may be substituted as follows: “2. The fee shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plaza for the length specified for such Toll Plaza: Location of Toll Plaza (Design chainage) Length (in km) for which fee is payable Design Chainage of the section* At km 4.000 (existing km 16.600) near Village Sonvay in District Indore 27.062 Km 0.000 to km 27.062 At km 75.700 (existing km 82.800) near Village Khalghat in District Dhar 50.258 Km 27.062 to km 77.320 Total 77.320 *As per existing chainage, the project stretch is from km 12.600 to km 84.700. ” [F. No. NHAI/13013/480/09-10/CO/GC-Indore (Indore-Khalghat) BOT] DAKSHITA DAS, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
